items.caption: A collection of six pharmaceutical vials, each labeled with different names and quantities, arranged against a white background. the labels include "lyophilized cytoxan," "dtic- (dacarbazine)," "bleomycin sulfate," "adriamycin," and "vepepid etoposide injection." the vials vary in size and color, with some having green caps and others having red or blue caps. the labels indicate the active ingredients and the number of units or milligrams contained within each vial. the style of the image is a straightforward product photograph with a focus on clarity and detail to show the branding and labeling of the medications.
